meaning: vt.签在...下,给...保险,签名,承诺支付vi.经营保险业
examples: National banks can package their own mortgages and underwrite them as securities.
The government will have to create a special agency to underwrite small business loans.
Shareholders moan that banks levy fat fees to underwrite rights issues even though the risk of a deal falling is minimal.
Wall Street as an industry should underwrite the cost of educating its registered persons.
Secretary Burns has actually declared that the U.S. will help underwrite its operations .
